entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A dryland cereal crop known for climate resilience and potential for iron and zinc supply.

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition resulting from micronutrient and vitamin deficiency in staple diets.

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT DEFICIENCY
entities.description: The lack of essential micronutrients and vitamins in the diet.

entities.name: CROP BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: A sustainable breeding strategy to address micronutrient and vitamin deficiency.

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A key micronutrient targeted for biofortification in pearl millet.

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A key micronutrient targeted for biofortification in pearl millet.

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand adverse climatic conditions.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographical region where pearl millet is primarily grown.

entities.name: HARVESTPLUS
entities.description: An organization that supported the pearl millet biofortification programme.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, which implemented the biofortification programme.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where biofortified pearl millet cultivars were released.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: A region where biofortified pearl millet cultivars were released.

entities.name: RAPID SCREENING TOOL
entities.description: A tool used for the early generation selection of high-iron materials.

entities.name: DIAGNOSTIC MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers used to identify specific traits like high-iron and drought tolerance.

entities.name: HIGH-FE SNPS
entities.description: Four single nucleotide polymorphisms encoding for high iron content.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE SNPS
entities.description: Ten single nucleotide polymorphisms encoding for drought tolerance.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to survive and produce under water-limited conditions.

entities.name: BIOAVAILABILITY STUDIES
entities.description: Studies confirming the amount of iron from biofortified pearl millet that is absorbed by the body.

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The capacity of the crop to withstand environmental stresses.
